text: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY): A flagship skill development initiative to enable Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training. Eligibility: Any Indian youth aged 15-45 with an Aadhaar card. Benefits: Free skill training in various sectors, certification recognized by the government, and placement assistance. Provides special focus on women and PwD.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

text: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY): Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro-enterprises. Eligibility: Small entrepreneurs, shopkeepers, fruit/vegetable vendors, and small-scale industries. Benefits: Loans in three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (₹50,000 to ₹5 lakh), and Tarun (₹5 lakh to ₹10 lakh). No collateral required.

Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA): Guarantees 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work. Eligibility: Adult members of rural households with a Job Card. Benefits: Statutory minimum wage, work within 5km of residence, and unemployment allowance if work is not provided within 15 days.

Stand-Up India Scheme: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise. Eligibility: SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs above 18 years. Benefits: Access to credit for manufacturing, services, or trading sectors. Composite loans up to 75% of the project cost.

PM-GatiShakti National Master Plan: A digital platform to bring 16 Ministries including Railways and Roadways together for integrated planning and coordinated implementation of infrastructure connectivity projects. Eligibility: Government agencies and infrastructure developers. Benefits: Reduced logistics costs, improved connectivity, and faster execution of infrastructure projects through synchronized planning.
